settings.title: CDP QR
settings.subtitle: Race Engineered
settings.description: The CDP Quick Release System is a proprietary development by CONSPIT, inspired by real-world Formula racing designs. Paired with a stable communication connection, it ensures a seamless driving experience when using the ARES wheelbase ecosystem, providing effortless control in all driving conditions.

settings.title: Race-Engineered Locking Mechanism
settings.description: CONSPIT steering wheels feature a Formula-inspired CNC-machined 7075 aluminum clasp and ball locking system. The clasp handles torque transmission, while the balls precisely manage longitudinal positioning. By decoupling load functions, this system ensures exceptional precision and long-lasting durability.

settings.title: Reliable Signal Stability
settings.description: Integrated spring contacts ensure the system maintains exceptional electrical stability, providing reliable performance even in environments prone to electromagnetic interference (EMI). This stable connection outperforms traditional wireless solutions, guaranteeing uninterrupted operation throughout intense racing scenarios.

settings.title: Zero-Play Durability
settings.description: The optimized contact geometry eliminates wear entirely, ensuring zero-play durability even under prolonged extreme loads. This design guarantees stable performance and enhanced longevity, even after extensive use.
